note: System-wide memory free % sampled every 20 s during the two real Q4 regimes. Safe mode (CPU + mmap) was monitored live and held steady; fast mode (GPU + -mmp 0, weights resident) drove the 8 GB machine into swap-death and FROZE it — there is no clean tail because the system became unresponsive. The freeze itself is the datum.

safe_cpu_mmap.outcome: stable — file-backed pages are reclaimable, RAM never exhausted

fast_gpu_resident.outcome: froze — 4.4 GB anonymous RSS on 8 GB exhausted RAM; system became unresponsive
